name: EMC2101 Fan Controller and Temperature sensor
description: The `emc2101` component allows you to control a cooling fan from ESPHome ([datasheet](https://ww1.microchip.com/downloads/aemDocuments/documents/MSLD/ProductDocuments/DataSheets/EMC2101-Data-Sheet-DS20006703.pdf)). It also provides temperature sensors and a tachometer. The fan can be controlled either by a PWM signal or by outputing a DC voltage using its DAC.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: Manually specify the I²C address of the sensor. Defaults to `0x4C`.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Inverts the output so 0 means 100% duty cycle and 1 means 0%. Defaults to `false`.

config_entries.label: DAC
config_entries.description:
**Required — set exactly one of:** `pwm`, `dac`.

Enable DAC output.

config_entries.label: Conversion Rate
config_entries.description: The number of digital to analog conversions perfomed per second. One of `1/16`, `1/8`, `1/4`, `1/2`, `1`, `2`, `4`, `8`, `16`, `32`. Defaults to `16`.

config_entries.label: PWM
config_entries.description:
**Required — set exactly one of:** `pwm`, `dac`.

Enable PWM output.

config_entries.label: Divider
config_entries.description: Value for the frequency divider. Defaults to `1`.

config_entries.label: Resolution
config_entries.description: Determines effective resolution and the frequency of the PWM signal. Defaults to `23`.
